sentences.arabic: شَاهَدَتِ الْجَدَّةُ هَاتِفَ حَفِيدِهَا لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Baka je po prvi put vidjela unukov telefon.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother saw her grandchild's phone for the first time.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْهُ: كَيْفَ تَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذَا الشَّيْءَ الصَّغِيرَ؟
sentences.translation: Pitala ga je: Kako koristiš ovu malu stvar?
sentences.translationEn: She asked him: How do you use this small thing?

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ لَهَا الْحَفِيدُ كَيْفَ يَتَّصِلُ بِالنَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Unuk joj je objasnio kako se kontaktira s ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: The grandchild explained to her how to contact people.

sentences.arabic: أُعْجِبَتِ الْجَدَّةُ وَقَالَتْ: الزَّمَانُ تَغَيَّرَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Baka se zadivila i rekla: Vremena su se mnogo promijenila.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother was amazed and said: Times have changed a lot.
